name: local-plugins
description: Max's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: figma-responsive
plugins.description: Generate responsive React/Next.js components from multiple Figma frames. Accepts desktop + mobile (+ optional tablet) links and produces a unified component with Tailwind breakpoints, cva variants, shared hooks, and the full design-system file set.

plugins.name: arch-sync
plugins.description: Multi-repo system architecture visualizer. Reads CLAUDE.md and INTEGRATION.md from sibling repos and generates a unified ARCHITECTURE.md from each repo's perspective.

plugins.name: supabase-schema
plugins.description: Extracts the full Supabase database schema (tables, columns, types, FK/PK, RPC functions) into SUPABASE_SCHEMA.md on every session start. Zero dependencies — pure Node.js. Works with any Supabase project.

plugins.name: vanbrunt
plugins.description: Vanbrunt project release utilities. Automates the master sync git workflow: creates a dated branch from staging reset to master, commits, and pushes.
